connectors.name: data_status
connectors.purpose: Expose raw_latest, qlib_latest, alignment, and universe readiness.

connectors.name: feature_store
connectors.purpose: Expose feature sets, coverage summaries, and derived artifacts.

connectors.name: model_registry
connectors.purpose: Expose model metadata, feature_set, train window, and production manifest.

connectors.name: backtest_store
connectors.purpose: Expose strict evaluation and rolling backtest outputs.

connectors.name: shadow_state
connectors.purpose: Expose real/shadow account state, plans, and reconciliation results.

connectors.name: repo_state
connectors.purpose: Expose repo version, changed files, and artifact paths for auditability.
